overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt trail at dusk. The character explores a moody, atmospheric landscape with snow-capped mountains, stone walls, and a distant village, encountering an NPC villager before continuing into a darker forested area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the snow-capped mountain in the distance

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak dominating the horizon
low stone wall running alongside the right side of the trail
winding dirt path with patches of grass
leafless deciduous trees silhouetted against the dark sky
green grassy areas flanking the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open rural trail at dusk, with a massive snow-capped mountain visible in the distance. The path is flanked by stone walls and patches of grass, while bare trees stand against the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail with distant village view

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back in the opposite direction along the trail

agents.ego_description: turned around on the path and now walking back toward the village visible in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of wooden village houses with lit windows visible in the valley
rustic wooden fence posts along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: After turning around, Geralt walks back along the trail as a distant village with wooden buildings comes into view. The stone wall now runs along the left side, and the snow-capped mountain shifts to the right of the frame.

agents.ego_description: walking past a villager standing by the path while approaching the forested area

notable_agents.action: villager standing by the stone wall watching Geralt pass by

entered.detail: thick evergreen trees beginning to line both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes a villager standing by the path as the trail enters a more forested area. The stone walls give way to dense evergreen trees, while the village remains visible ahead in the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with valley village view

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dark forest toward the village visible in the valley below

entered.detail: gnarled dead trees among the evergreens
clusters of purple wildflowers along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a dense, dark forest with dead trees and wildflowers lining the path. The village remains visible in the distance below, nestled in the valley as the mountain looms overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail at dusk that transitions from an open mountain vista into a dense, dark forest. It begins with Geralt walking past stone walls and bare trees under an overcast sky, with a massive snow-capped mountain looming in the distance. As he turns around and retraces his steps, the perspective shifts to reveal a distant village of wooden buildings nestled in the valley while the mountain moves to the right of the frame. The scene then opens up as he passes a lone villager, with the stone walls gradually giving way to thick evergreen trees. Finally, the trail descends further into a dark forest of dead trees and wildflowers, keeping the village visible in the valley below as the mountain remains overhead.
